scope: records generated by the sequential transactional repair dynamics of the cyclic cap-net tower; charts are the produced stereographic embeddings with noise calibrated to the measured modular cross-ratio residuals; clock is the 2pi-normalized modular unit per commit tick; ancestry is the intrinsic read-after-write transitive closure. The realized event set is a (1+2)-dimensional screen sheet, measured as such --- exactly countermodel (i) of the event packet: dimension is a population output. The bulk-depth record channel (E3 rank four, hence 3+1) is the remaining structural gate.
receipts_pending: E3 rank-four frames: bulk-depth record channel (H^3 radial coordinate) on the realized tower
bulk E1 population (records off the screen sheet)
